name: automated-environment-verification
description: Provide automated environment verification script (verify_dev_setup.sh) that checks prerequisites, versions, configuration, and provides actionable fix guidance. Include checks for runtime versions, dependency installation, config files, and cloud credentials.

content: .env.example format: Organize by logical sections with headers (=== Section Name ===), include inline comments explaining each variable, provide example values, and document optional vs required variables. This significantly improves onboarding.

name: lambda-terraform-packaging
description: Lambda functions in Terraform modules use data.archive_file to create zip packages from source files at module path (\${path.module}/lambda/), with source_code_hash tracking for proper updates. Functions are invoked via null_resource + local-exec on first deployment.

name: dx-tooling-modernization
description: Add uv/bun detection to startup scripts with auto-selection of fastest available package manager, include installation instructions in docs, update all path references to match actual directory structure (src/frontend/ not frontend/)

content: Async wrapper pattern for blocking I/O: Use asyncio.to_thread() to wrap blocking boto3/requests calls in async functions, preventing event loop blocking in FastAPI. Applied consistently across embedding providers for all AWS API calls.

name: test-infrastructure-setup
description: Test infrastructure setup: Separate Python (pytest + FastAPI TestClient) and frontend (vitest + Testing Library) test suites with shared fixtures, proper mocking (jsdom, ResizeObserver, matchMedia), and pytest markers for test categorization (unit, integration, e2e, api, terraform, provider). Python tests use conftest.py for fixtures, frontend uses vitest.config.ts with test/setup.ts for global mocks.

name: benchmark-page-workflow
description: React page components for benchmark workflows: 5-page flow (Hub → Configure → Run → Results → History) using shadcn/ui, Recharts visualization, real-time polling for progress, URL-based routing for shareable results, and selection-based comparison UI. Pages in src/frontend/src/components/pages/ with consistent layout patterns.

content: React page components follow consistent structure: useState for local state, useEffect for side effects with cleanup (intervals, event listeners), useNavigate for routing. API client imported from @/api/client, UI components from @/components/ui/*.

React Router integration: Pages use useParams for route params, useNavigate for navigation. Components remain router-agnostic by accepting callbacks. VideoPlayer uses autoPlay (capital P) prop, not autoplay.

React Router integration must respect each page component's export pattern. Deployment wizard pages use default exports (export default function), while benchmark/demo/infrastructure pages use named exports (export const Component: React.FC). Always check actual exports before importing.

name: minimal-mocking-frontend-tests
description: Frontend test infrastructure: Use vitest with jsdom environment, minimal mocking (only network boundaries), testing-library for user-centric tests. Organize tests by component type (pages/, components/, routing, api-client). Use pytest markers for selective test execution (unit, integration, e2e, terraform, requires_aws).

content: Pytest markers for flexible test execution: @pytest.mark.{unit,integration,e2e,provider,requires_aws,real_aws,slow,expensive} - allows CI to run fast tests (pytest -m 'not slow and not real_aws'), dev to run with AWS (--requires-aws), full tests with real AWS (--real-aws).

description: Terraform variable validation cannot cross-reference other variables (var.max >= var.min fails validation). Found in embedding_provider_marketplace and pgvector_aurora modules
resolution: Remove cross-variable validations or validate at apply time, not variable definition

content: React Router navigation active states for multi-page sections: Use location.pathname.startsWith(item.path) for sections with sub-routes, but exact match (===) for home route. Ensures nav items stay highlighted across all sub-pages within a section.

name: react-context-bypass-antipattern
description: Pages calling api.* directly instead of using Context providers breaks centralized state management and causes duplicate API calls. Always use custom hooks (useSearch, useInfrastructure) to access Context state and actions.

content: React useEffect polling pattern: Never include rapidly-changing state (elapsed time counters) in useEffect dependency array - it causes effect restart on every update. Calculate derived values inside the polling function instead.

CORS configuration: Wire SecurityConfiguration.enable_cors flag to actual CORS middleware. Use conditional middleware addition: if config.security.enable_cors: app.add_middleware(CORSMiddleware, ...). Environment-based defaults: True for dev/testing, False for production.

name: async-wrapper-manager-pattern
description: Async wrapper methods for sync manager classes: Add async_method_name() methods that wrap blocking sync methods with asyncio.to_thread() for FastAPI compatibility. Pattern: async def async_method_name(...): return await asyncio.to_thread(self.method_name, ...). Applied to EnhancedStorageIntegrationManager and MultiVectorCoordinator service classes.

content: Wrap boto3.Session().get_credentials() in async functions: In async functions that call boto3.Session().get_credentials(), wrap the call with await asyncio.to_thread() to avoid blocking the event loop. Applied in opensearch/engine_manager.py and opensearch/hybrid_search.py.
